title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Bosch India Software Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Bosch India Software Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Bosch India Software Digital Technologies in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bosch India Software Digital Technologies:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software Digital Technologies!
